info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Proxy Service API
Qlik Sense Enterprise Get QPS API information

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves basic information about the Qlik Sense Proxy Service API, including the build version.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get complete endpoint description

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves a complete list of all endpoints available in the QPS API. This serves as the API discovery mechanism.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List all sessions

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all active user sessions managed by the proxy service. Each session represents an authenticated user connection.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get session by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific user session by its unique session identifier.

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Performs a teardown of all connections for a session. The Session module is notified, and the logout module is also notified if there are no more sessions for the user.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get sessions for a user

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: userDirectory
params.description: Name of the user directory the user belongs to

params.name: userId
params.description: User identifier within the user directory

items.docs: Retrieves all active sessions for a specific user identified by their user directory and user ID.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Delete all sessions for a user

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: userId
params.description: User identifier within the user directory

items.docs: Deletes all active sessions for a specific user, effectively logging the user out of all Qlik Sense connections.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get session count for a user

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: userId
params.description: User identifier within the user directory

items.docs: Returns the number of active sessions for a specific user.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Prioritize engine services for load balancing

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Prioritizes Qlik Sense Engine Services (QES) for a user and an app. The Load Balancing module makes load balancing decisions for engine sessions to distribute load across available engine services.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Check proxy service health

items.docs: Returns the health status of the Qlik Sense Proxy Service.
